title: App Settings - General - User stays logged in after restating the app
scenario: User remains logged in after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app, but passcode or Face ID prompt is not shown upon reopening
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Go to App Settings → General → Account.
Restart the app (force close and reopen).
Navigate back to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: User should remain logged in, and upon reopening the app a passcode or Face ID prompt should appear depending on phone settings.
